algebra-scales.title: Algebra Scales
algebra-scales.hook: x is just an unknown weight — find it by balancing
algebra-scales.realWorldConnection: Engineers use algebra to balance forces in bridges
algebra-scales.unsolvedQuestion: Can some equations have no solution, or infinite solutions?

cell-city.title: Cell City
cell-city.hook: Design a cell like an architect — every organelle has a role
cell-city.realWorldConnection: Understanding cells leads to cures for cancer
cell-city.unsolvedQuestion: How did the first cell come to exist?

chemical-balancer.title: Chemical Balancer
chemical-balancer.hook: Atoms cannot be created or destroyed — balance both sides
chemical-balancer.realWorldConnection: Pharmacists balance equations to make safe medicines
chemical-balancer.unsolvedQuestion: Why do some reactions release energy and others absorb it?

geometry-proof.title: Geometry Proof Builder
geometry-proof.hook: Prove it is always true — not just for one triangle
geometry-proof.realWorldConnection: Architects and GPS systems rely on Pythagorean theorem
geometry-proof.unsolvedQuestion: Are there other number systems where Pythagoras fails?

speed-distance-time.title: Speed Distance Time
speed-distance-time.hook: The slope of a graph IS speed — find it without a formula
speed-distance-time.realWorldConnection: Train scheduling and GPS use this every second
speed-distance-time.unsolvedQuestion: What happens to speed as you approach the speed of light?

genetics-simulator.title: Genetics Simulator
genetics-simulator.hook: Predict which traits offspring inherit using probability
genetics-simulator.realWorldConnection: Doctors use genetics to predict inherited diseases
genetics-simulator.unsolvedQuestion: Why do twins sometimes have different personalities?

plate-tectonics.title: Plate Tectonics
plate-tectonics.hook: The ground beneath you is slowly moving — continents drift
plate-tectonics.realWorldConnection: India crashed into Asia to form the Himalayas
plate-tectonics.unsolvedQuestion: What drives plate movement deep inside Earth?

literary-analysis.title: Literary Analysis
literary-analysis.hook: Every story has hidden patterns — find the author's secret tools
literary-analysis.realWorldConnection: Understanding persuasion helps you resist manipulation
literary-analysis.unsolvedQuestion: Can a story mean something the author never intended?

economic-simulation.title: Economic Simulation
economic-simulation.hook: Supply and demand — the invisible force that prices everything
economic-simulation.realWorldConnection: Why does onion price change every week in India?
economic-simulation.unsolvedQuestion: Can an economy be perfectly fair?

periodic-table.title: Periodic Table Explorer
periodic-table.hook: Every element has a story — discover the pattern behind them all
periodic-table.unsolvedQuestion: How many elements can exist before they become unstable?

probability-sandbox.title: Probability Sandbox
probability-sandbox.hook: Chance is not random — it follows rules you can discover
probability-sandbox.realWorldConnection: Insurance companies use probability to set prices
probability-sandbox.unsolvedQuestion: Is anything truly random, or do we just not know enough?

carbon-cycle.title: Carbon Cycle
carbon-cycle.hook: The carbon in you was once in a dinosaur — trace its journey
carbon-cycle.realWorldConnection: Burning fossil fuels releases ancient carbon into the air
carbon-cycle.unsolvedQuestion: How much carbon can the ocean absorb before it changes?

number-systems.title: Number Systems
number-systems.hook: Binary is not strange — it is how computers think
number-systems.realWorldConnection: Every photo on your phone is just 1s and 0s
number-systems.unsolvedQuestion: Are there number systems we have not discovered yet?

fermi-estimation.title: Fermi Estimation
fermi-estimation.hook: How many piano tuners are in Mumbai? You can figure it out
fermi-estimation.realWorldConnection: Scientists use Fermi estimation to check if results make sense
fermi-estimation.unsolvedQuestion: How many intelligent civilizations exist in the galaxy?

algebra-scales.question: Are there patterns in prime numbers?
algebra-scales.context: The Riemann Hypothesis is about prime number patterns.

cell-city.question: How did the first living cell form from non-living matter?
cell-city.context: Abiogenesis remains one of the biggest unanswered questions.

plate-tectonics.question: What exactly drives plate movement in the mantle?
plate-tectonics.context: Convection currents are part of it, but the full mechanism is debated.

economic-simulation.question: Can we design an economy that is both efficient and fair?
economic-simulation.context: Every economic system has trade-offs between equity and growth.

fermi-estimation.question: How many intelligent civilizations exist in our galaxy?
fermi-estimation.context: The Drake Equation gives a framework but no answer.

algebra-scales.title: Linear algebra
algebra-scales.description: What if you have multiple unknowns? Matrices solve them.

cell-city.title: Mitochondria are ancient bacteria

cell-city.title: Stem cells
cell-city.description: Some cells can become any type — this is how healing works.

cell-city.title: Synthetic biology
cell-city.description: Scientists are building artificial cells from scratch.

chemical-balancer.description: Matter is never lost — it just changes form.

chemical-balancer.description: In nuclear reactions, matter becomes energy. E = mc².

geometry-proof.description: Written in 300 BCE, still the basis of geometry today.

speed-distance-time.description: At near-light speed, time itself slows down.

speed-distance-time.title: Indian astronomers
speed-distance-time.description: Kerala school calculated infinite series for trig functions centuries before Europe.

genetics-simulator.description: Your DNA determines which medicines work best for you.

plate-tectonics.description: We still cannot predict earthquakes — this is an active research area.

plate-tectonics.title: Himalayan formation
plate-tectonics.description: India is still pushing into Asia — Everest grows 4mm per year.

literary-analysis.description: Can an AI write a poem that moves you? What does that mean?

number-systems.description: √-1 is not real — but it powers all of electrical engineering.

economics-probability.description: Stock prices move by probability — not certainty.

number-probability.description: Random number generation uses number theory — computers simulate chance.
